childAltar.hintText: 3 Spiritual Stones found in Hyrule...^$0Link's Pocket...^$1Spirit Temple...^$2Water Temple...^$oYe who may become a Hero...&The path to the future is open...

adultAltar.hintText: An awakening voice from the Sacred&Realm will call those destined to be&Sages, who dwell in the five temples.^$8Shadow Temple...^$3Forest Temple...^$4Fire Temple...^$5Jabu-Jabu's Belly...^$6Deku Tree...^$7Dodongo's Cavern...^$lThe awakened ones will await&for the Hero to collect&4 Medallions.^$bAnd the %revil one%w's key will&be given to the Hero once&the %rTriforce%w is completed.^$kTogether with the Hero of Time,&the awakened ones will return&the light of peace to the world...

ganonText: Zelda is probably going to do&something stupid, like send you&back to your own timeline.^So this is quite meaningless. Do&you really want to save this&moron?
ganonHintText: Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me&by reflecting my lightning bolts&and unleashing the arrows from&%rLake Hylia!
dampeText: Whoever reads this, please enter&%rHyrule Field%w. I will let you&have my stretching, shrinking&keepsake.^I'm waiting for you.&--Dampé
gregText: By the way, if you're interested,&I saw the shiniest %gGreen Rupee%w&somewhere in%r Desert Colossus%w.^It's said to have %cmysterious&powers%w...^But then, it could just be another&regular rupee.&Oh well.
sheikText: I overheard Ganondorf say that he&misplaced the %yLight Arrows%w in&%rLake Hylia%w.
sariaText: Did you feel the %gsurge of&magic%w recently? A mysterious&bird told me it came from %rDeath&Mountain Crater%w.^You should check that place out,&@!$C
